description: Composition:These shoes are made of pure leatherCare: Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyFit:RegularGeneral:leather shoes have long been known to be the essential formal footwear. However, the current trend lists leather shoes, be it black, tan, brown or fawn, as the most versatile piece of footwear. They can also be combined with ultra-slim fit jeans and a jazzy party shirt, with gelled hair and minimal accessories so that the focus remains on the style and not the accessories. With stitched upper and a textured outsole, these shoes promises to be a good bargain. While it will be fall-resistant, it will be stylish as well.
